description: Chef Nusrat picks light, comforting treats—perfect for solo snackers or late-night bites. Her box offers a smooth and cozy snacking experience monthly.
A minimal, mindful selection curated by Chef Arif for everyday enjoyment—this crate balances simplicity and taste in every snack-packed monthly delivery.
Chef Tamanna adds bold flavors and monthly surprises to elevate your routine—each crate mixes exciting, flavorful twists with everyday favorites you’ll love.
A variety-packed crate by Chef Shafiq blends local and global flavors to delight curious snackers. His box invites adventurous palates to explore.
Chef Rumi brings gourmet indulgence with personal flair—her premium crate blends sweet, savory, and luxurious elements for a monthly  snack journey.
A rich, curated selection by Chef Saifur made for foodies who crave top-tier bites. Expect bold, diverse, and high-quality flavors packed into every crate.
